---
name: "\U0001F680 Feature Request"
about: Suggest a new feature, module, or improvement for TRISHUL Scanner
title: "[FEATURE] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

## 🎯 Feature Summary

A brief, one-line description of the feature you'd like added.

---

## 💡 Motivation

Why should this feature be added? What problem does it solve?

---

## 📐 Proposed Solution

Describe how you think this should work. Include:

- Which module/component it belongs to (or if it's a new one)
- Expected CLI options (if any)
- Expected output / report section

---

## 🔄 Alternatives Considered

Any alternative approaches you've considered.

---

## ⚠ Security Considerations

If this feature involves active scanning or sending payloads, explain:
- How false positives will be minimized
- How it stays within ethical/passive limits
- Any rate limiting concerns

---

## 📋 Additional Context

Any references, tools, CVEs, or screenshots that support this request.
